tools.name: proofrelay.get_verifier_status
tools.description: Read the ProofRelay verifier status, accepted bundle shape, and trust boundary before submitting evidence. Use this first when an agent needs to understand what ProofRelay verifies and what it does not.

tools.name: proofrelay.recommend_checkpoint
tools.description: Choose the next public-safe GENESIS checkpoint for a paid, material, or relied-upon agent workflow. Submit normalized context only; the tool returns reason codes without protected routing internals.

tools.name: proofrelay.verify_bundle
tools.description: Verify a submitted non-confidential ProofRelay V1 or V2 evidence bundle for hash integrity, monotonic ordering, signatures, and chain continuity. The tool does not charge, settle, mutate storage, or certify external facts.

tools.name: proofrelay.normalize_payment_proof
tools.description: Validate rail-agnostic payment or entitlement proof hashes and return the ProofRelay payment_context evidence profile. This does not charge, settle, custody funds, or verify external payment finality.

tools.name: proofrelay.build_bundle_draft
tools.description: Build a canonical, unsigned, non-attesting ProofRelay bundle draft from public-safe event hashes. The public MCP server does not sign or certify caller-provided facts.

tools.name: proofrelay.describe_stripe_entitlement_flow
tools.description: Return the agent-native Stripe checkout entitlement workflow for ProofRelay paid verification, including token, status, redemption, and replay expectations.

tools.name: proofrelay.adapt_x402_payment_proof
tools.description: Map public-safe x402 request, 402 challenge, payment payload, facilitator response, and resource response hashes into ProofRelay's payment_context evidence profile.

tools.name: proofrelay.plan_replay_rejection_test
tools.description: Return a deterministic replay rejection test plan and optionally classify observed first/replay responses. The tool does not redeem tokens or call paid endpoints.

tools.name: proofrelay.wrap_mcp_tool_evidence
tools.description: Convert hash-only MCP tool request, response, schema, authority, and payment context references into a portable ProofRelay evidence wrapper without ingesting raw prompts, outputs, credentials, or logs.

tools.name: proofrelay.map_openapi_operation_evidence
tools.description: Map public OpenAPI operation metadata and schema hashes into a ProofRelay event plan with checkpoint recommendations for paid, mutating, or relied-upon API operations.

tools.name: proofrelay.generate_paid_tool_receipt
tools.description: Generate an unsigned, hash-only paid MCP/API tool receipt draft that callers can include in a signed ProofRelay bundle. The tool does not charge, redeem, settle, or attest to external facts.

tools.name: proofrelay.scan_mcp_risk
tools.description: Return a read-only, public-metadata MCP risk score from tool descriptors, schemas, and registry claims. Use before listing, integrating, or wrapping another MCP server; it does not fetch network data, require auth, mutate systems, inspect source code, or certify vulnerability status.

tools.name: proofrelay.describe_cli_sdk_helper
tools.description: Return public-safe setup guidance for connecting MCP clients to ProofRelay and preparing hash-only evidence inputs without exposing secrets or requiring package installation.

tools.name: proofrelay.build_human_approval_receipt
tools.description: Build an unsigned, hash-only human approval receipt draft for authority, policy, and subject evidence. The tool does not create approval authority or certify the approver's identity.

tools.name: proofrelay.build_audit_pack_manifest
tools.description: Build a portable hash-only audit pack manifest from bundle, verifier, policy, and evidence hashes without uploading private files or logs.

tools.name: proofrelay.summarize_agent_action_log
tools.description: Summarize public-safe agent action log counts and hashes into a governance review profile without ingesting raw logs or traces.

tools.name: proofrelay.review_vendor_risk_profile
tools.description: Review public vendor or MCP server risk metadata for governance signals using hashes and declared boundaries only. This is not legal, security, or procurement certification.

tools.name: proofrelay.build_title_production_evidence
tools.description: Build a hash-only title production evidence profile from order, property, title-search, commitment, exception, and tax-cert hashes. The tool does not certify title status or legal sufficiency.

tools.name: proofrelay.build_closing_proof_pack
tools.description: Build a hash-only closing proof pack manifest from settlement, title, lender, funding, notary, disbursement, and approval hashes. The tool does not authorize closing or disbursement.

tools.name: proofrelay.review_wire_payoff_change
tools.description: Review hash-only wire, payoff, or disbursement change metadata for red flags and required controls without approving funds movement.

tools.name: proofrelay.map_lender_condition_evidence
tools.description: Map lender condition text, evidence, reviewer, and waiver hashes into a portable condition profile without satisfying lender conditions.

tools.name: proofrelay.compute_readiness_signal
tools.description: Compute a public-safe readiness signal from title, closing, wire, lender-condition, approval, exception, and risk hashes/counts. The tool does not certify readiness to close or fund.

tools.name: proofrelay.adapt_agent_identity_evidence
tools.description: Map Concordium, ERC-8004, DID, domain, wallet-controller, or IAM identity references into a hash-only PREP-3 input. ProofRelay accepts identity as evidence; it does not issue identity or certify people.

tools.name: proofrelay.build_registry_entry
tools.description: Build a public-safe ProofRelay Registry entry draft for an agent, API, MCP server, workflow, or adapter using only hashes and profile markers.

tools.name: proofrelay.issue_conformance_badge
tools.description: Build an unsigned ProofRelay evidence-conformance badge draft such as PREP-compatible, Verified Bundle, Verified MCP, or Replay Tested. This is not legal, security, model-safety, or platform certification.

tools.name: proofrelay.verify_signed_attestation
tools.description: Verify a legacy Ed25519 or V2 ES256 ProofRelay artifact using public key material and optional issuer/purpose pins. The tool never accepts private keys and does not sign caller claims.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "proofrelay.wrap_mcp_tool_evidence" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Convert hash-only MCP tool request, response, schema, authority, and payment context references into a portable ProofRelay evidence wrapper without ingesting ra…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "prompt:proofrelay.test_replay_rejection" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Guide an agent to confirm deterministic replay rejection without logging bearer tokens.
